title: ModernMarkings
description: This mod is a simple mod that adds various industrial and modern floor markings.
body:
This mod is a simple mod that adds various industrial and modern floor markings.
comes with OSHA compliant tooltips and hazard stripes for the extra realism!


This is my first attempt at making a mod. it may have problems or other issues- tell me if that happens!

the 0.2 version should work on forge 47.3. the 0.1 version most likely will not.

0.3 has been released and also been ported to 1.12.2.

Huge thanks to the GTNH developers who have backported, and is maintaining, the mod for 1.7.10!
the 1.7.10 version requires chisel for the recipes.

Thanks to jmecn for the chinese translation!
